title: incorrect OCIRuntime detection in buildah vs podman
body:
**Description**

On a new Debian system, podman is able to build containers but buildah is not.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. Create Dockerfile

```
$ cat <<EOF > Dockerfile
> FROM docker.io/python:3
> RUN /usr/local/bin/pip install pipenv
> EOF
```

2. buildah bud -f Dockerfile -t buildah-test
3. failure


**Describe the results you received:**

```
$ buildah bud -f Dockerfile -t buildah-test
STEP 1: FROM docker.io/python:3
STEP 2: RUN /usr/local/bin/pip install pipenv
error running container: error creating container for [/bin/sh -c /usr/local/bin/pip install pipenv]: : exec: "crun": executable file not found in $PATH
error building at STEP "RUN /usr/local/bin/pip install pipenv": error while running runtime: exit status 1
ERRO exit status 1                 
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

A working container build.

```
$ podman build --no-cache -f Dockerfile -t podman-test
STEP 1: FROM docker.io/python:3
STEP 2: RUN /usr/local/bin/pip install pipenv
Collecting pipenv
  Downloading pipenv-2020.11.15-py2.py3-none-any.whl (3.9 MB)
Collecting virtualenv-clone>=0.2.5
  Downloading virtualenv_clone-0.5.4-py2.py3-none-any.whl (6.6 kB)
Requirement already satisfied: pip>=18.0 in /usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages (from pipenv) (21.0.1)
Requirement already satisfied: setuptools>=36.2.1 in /usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages (from pipenv) (56.0.0)
Collecting virtualenv
  Downloading virtualenv-20.4.3-py2.py3-none-any.whl (7.2 MB)
Collecting certifi
  Downloading certifi-2020.12.5-py2.py3-none-any.whl (147 kB)
Collecting six<2,>=1.9.0
  Downloading six-1.15.0-py2.py3-none-any.whl (10 kB)
Collecting appdirs<2,>=1.4.3
  Downloading appdirs-1.4.4-py2.py3-none-any.whl (9.6 kB)
Collecting distlib<1,>=0.3.1
  Downloading distlib-0.3.1-py2.py3-none-any.whl (335 kB)
Collecting filelock<4,>=3.0.0
  Downloading filelock-3.0.12-py3-none-any.whl (7.6 kB)
Installing collected packages: six, filelock, distlib, appdirs, virtualenv-clone, virtualenv, certifi, pipenv
Successfully installed appdirs-1.4.4 certifi-2020.12.5 distlib-0.3.1 filelock-3.0.12 pipenv-2020.11.15 six-1.15.0 virtualenv-20.4.3 virtualenv-clone-0.5.4
STEP 3: COMMIT podman-test
--> 1da79a68cb4
1da79a68cb4f25a598564193d147f2339dd1da3141e03574cdc33a4b50a58fba
```


**Output of `rpm -q buildah` or `apt list buildah`:**

```
$ apt list buildah
Listing... Done
buildah/testing,now 1.19.6+dfsg1-1+b2 amd64 [installed]
buildah/testing 1.19.6+dfsg1-1+b2 i386

$ apt list podman
Listing... Done
podman/testing,now 3.0.1+dfsg1-1+b1 amd64 [installed]
podman/testing 3.0.1+dfsg1-1+b1 i386

```

**Output of `buildah version`:**

```
$ buildah version
Version:         1.19.6
Go Version:      go1.15.9
Image Spec:      1.0.1
Runtime Spec:    1.0.2-dev
CNI Spec:        0.4.0
libcni Version:  
image Version:   5.10.3
Git Commit:      
Built:           Thu Jan  1 10:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64

```

**Output of `podman version` if reporting a `podman build` issue:**

```
$ podman version
Version:      3.0.1
API Version:  3.0.0
Go Version:   go1.15.8
Built:        Thu Jan  1 10:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64

```

**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

```
PRETTY_NAME="Debian GNU/Linux bullseye/sid"
NAME="Debian GNU/Linux"
ID=debian
HOME_URL="https://www.debian.org/"
SUPPORT_URL="https://www.debian.org/support"
BUG_REPORT_URL="https://bugs.debian.org/"
VERSION_ID="99"
VERSION="99 (sid)"
VERSION_CODENAME="sid"

```

**Output of `uname -a`:**

```
Linux pushan 5.10.0-5-amd64 #1 SMP Debian 5.10.24-1 (2021-03-19) x86_64 GNU/Linux
```

**Output of `cat /etc/containers/storage.conf`:**

```
$ cat /etc/containers/storage.conf
cat: /etc/containers/storage.conf: No such file or directory
```

**Output of `buildah info`:**

```
{
    "host": {
        "CgroupVersion": "v2",
        "Distribution": {
            "distribution": "debian",
            "version": "99"
        },
        "MemFree": 760913920,
        "MemTotal": 12512288768,
        "OCIRuntime": "crun",
        "SwapFree": 5797253120,
        "SwapTotal": 10737414144,
        "arch": "amd64",
        "cpus": 8,
        "hostname": "pushan",
        "kernel": "5.10.0-5-amd64",
        "os": "linux",
        "rootless": true,
        "uptime": "313h 37m 52.84s (Approximately 13.04 days)"
    },
    "store": {
        "ContainerStore": {
            "number": 6
        },
        "GraphDriverName": "overlay",
        "GraphOptions": [
            "overlay.mount_program=/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs"
        ],
        "GraphRoot": "/home/anand/.local/share/containers/storage",
        "GraphStatus": {
            "Backing Filesystem": "xfs",
            "Native Overlay Diff": "false",
            "Supports d_type": "true",
            "Using metacopy": "false"
        },
        "ImageStore": {
            "number": 9
        },
        "RunRoot": "/run/user/1000/containers"
    }
}
```

**Output of `podman info`:**
```
host:
  arch: amd64
  buildahVersion: 1.19.6
  cgroupManager: systemd
  cgroupVersion: v2
  conmon:
    package: 'conmon: /usr/bin/conmon'
    path: /usr/bin/conmon
    version: 'conmon version 2.0.25, commit: unknown'
  cpus: 8
  distribution:
    distribution: debian
    version: "99"
  eventLogger: journald
  hostname: pushan
  idMappings:
    gidmap:
    - container_id: 0
      host_id: 1000
      size: 1
    - container_id: 1
      host_id: 100000
      size: 65536
    uidmap:
    - container_id: 0
      host_id: 1000
      size: 1
    - container_id: 1
      host_id: 100000
      size: 65536
  kernel: 5.10.0-5-amd64
  linkmode: dynamic
  memFree: 796590080
  memTotal: 12512288768
  ociRuntime:
    name: runc
    package: 'runc: /usr/bin/runc'
    path: /usr/bin/runc
    version: |-
      runc version 1.0.0~rc93+ds1
      commit: 1.0.0~rc93+ds1-2+b2
      spec: 1.0.2-dev
      go: go1.15.9
      libseccomp: 2.5.1
  os: linux
  remoteSocket:
    path: /run/user/1000/podman/podman.sock
  security:
    apparmorEnabled: false
    capabilities: CAP_CHOWN,CAP_DAC_OVERRIDE,CAP_FOWNER,CAP_FSETID,CAP_KILL,CAP_NET_BIND_SERVICE,CAP_SETFCAP,CAP_SETGID,CAP_SETPCAP,CAP_SETUID,CAP_SYS_CHROOT
    rootless: true
    seccompEnabled: true
    selinuxEnabled: false
  slirp4netns:
    executable: /usr/bin/slirp4netns
    package: 'slirp4netns: /usr/bin/slirp4netns'
    version: |-
      slirp4netns version 1.0.1
      commit: 6a7b16babc95b6a3056b33fb45b74a6f62262dd4
      libslirp: 4.4.0
  swapFree: 5797253120
  swapTotal: 10737414144
  uptime: 313h 37m 43.19s (Approximately 13.04 days)
registries: {}
store:
  configFile: /home/anand/.config/containers/storage.conf
  containerStore:
    number: 6
    paused: 0
    running: 0
    stopped: 6
  graphDriverName: overlay
  graphOptions:
    overlay.mount_program:
      Executable: /usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs
      Package: 'fuse-overlayfs: /usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs'
      Version: |-
        fusermount3 version: 3.10.2
        fuse-overlayfs: version 1.4
        FUSE library version 3.10.2
        using FUSE kernel interface version 7.31
  graphRoot: /home/anand/.local/share/containers/storage
  graphStatus:
    Backing Filesystem: xfs
    Native Overlay Diff: "false"
    Supports d_type: "true"
    Using metacopy: "false"
  imageStore:
    number: 9
  runRoot: /run/user/1000/containers
  volumePath: /home/anand/.local/share/containers/storage/volumes
version:
  APIVersion: 3.0.0
  Built: 0
  BuiltTime: Thu Jan  1 10:00:00 1970
  GitCommit: ""
  GoVersion: go1.15.8
  OsArch: linux/amd64
  Version: 3.0.1
```

comments.body: This looks like buildah is not failing over from crun to runc.
